zh.lifeSummary: Pharamus de Boulogne是William de Boulogne和Blanche de Tingry的兒子，於1109年之前出生在英國素瑞。他和Matilda Ridel至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1184年在英國肯特多福 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Pharamus de Boulogne是William de Boulogne和Blanche de Tingry的儿子，于1109年之前出生在英国素瑞。他和Matilda Ridel至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1184年在英国肯特多福 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: Pharamus de Boulogne was born before 1109, in Surrey, England as the son of William de Boulogne and Blanche de Tingry. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Matilda Ridel. He died in 1184, in Dover Castle, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Pharamus de Boulogne est né avant 1109, à Surrey, Angleterre, fils de William de Boulogne et Blanche de Tingry. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Matilda Ridel. Il est décédé en 1184, à Dover Castle, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Pharamus de Boulogne wurde vor 1109 in Surrey, England, als Sohn von William de Boulogne und Blanche de Tingry geboren. Er hatte mit Matilda Ridel mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1184 in Dover Castle, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Pharamus de Boulogne è nato il prima del 1109 nel Surrey, England come figlio di William de Boulogne e Blanche de Tingry. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Matilda Ridel. Morì nel 1184, nel Dover Castle, Kent, England.

ja.Boulogne, France: フランスピカーディボウログン
ja.lifeSummary: Pharamus de Boulogneは1109年以前にイギリススリーでWilliam de BoulogneとBlanche de Tingryの息子として生まれた。彼はMatilda Ridelとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1184年にイギリスケントドバー カストルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Pharamus de Boulogne(은)는 1109년 이전 영국 수리에서 William de Boulogne(와)과 Blanche de Tingry의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Matilda Ridel(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1184년 영국 켄트 도버 카스틀에서 사망했다.

mn.Rycote, Oxfordshire, England: Rycote, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Pharamus de Boulogne nasceu antes 1109, em Surrey, Inglaterra filho de William de Boulogne e Blanche de Tingry. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Matilda Ridel. Ele faleceu em 1184, em Dover Castle, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Pharamus de Boulogne родился перед 1109 г. в местности сурри, Англия. Его родителей звали William de Boulogne и Blanche de Tingry. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Matilda Ridel. Он умер в 1184 г. в местности довир кастл, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Pharamus de Boulogne nació antes de 1109, en Surrey, Inglaterra como hijo de William de Boulogne y Blanche de Tingry. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Matilda Ridel. Murió en 1184, en Dover Castle, Kent, Inglaterra.
